recommendations.title: Slow West
recommendations.overview: In the Old West, a 17-year-old Scottish boy teams up with a mysterious gunman to find the woman with whom he is infatuated.

recommendations.title: Death Rides a Horse
recommendations.overview: Bill Meceita, a boy whose family was murdered in front of him by a gang, sets out 15 years later to exact revenge. On his journey, he finds himself continually sparring and occasionally cooperating with Ryan, a gunfighter on his own quest for vengean

recommendations.title: The Return of Frank James
recommendations.overview: Farmer Frank and his ward hunt brother Jesse's killers, the back-shooting Fords.

recommendations.title: Appaloosa
recommendations.overview: Two friends hired to police a small town that is suffering under the rule of a rancher find their job complicated by the arrival of a young widow.

recommendations.title: Gabbar Is Back
recommendations.overview: A vigilante network taking out corrupt officials draws the notice of the authorities.

recommendations.title: Horizon: An American Saga - Chapter 1
recommendations.overview: In 1859, families discover the lure of the Old West as they settle in territories from Wyoming to Kansas. Meanwhile, a gruff cowboy finds himself on the run with a prostitute and a young boy after killing a fellow gunman.

recommendations.title: Broken Arrow
recommendations.overview: Indian scout Tom Jeffords is sent out to stem the war between the American settlers and Apaches in the late 1870s Arizona. He learns that the Indians kill only to protect themselves, or out of retaliation for white atrocities.

recommendations.title: Duel in the Sun
recommendations.overview: Beautiful half-breed Pearl Chavez becomes the ward of her dead father's first love and finds herself torn between her sons, one good and the other bad.

recommendations.title: Open Range
recommendations.overview: A former gunslinger is forced to take up arms again when he and his cattle crew are threatened by a corrupt lawman.

recommendations.title: Woman Walks Ahead
recommendations.overview: Based on a true story, this riveting western follows a headstrong New York widow as she journeys west to meet Sioux chief Sitting Bull, facing off with an army officer intent on war with Native Americans.
